See [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repo root for the canonical agent guide.

Per-app and per-library guides live alongside the code:

- `apps/habitat/AGENTS.md`
- `apps/hearth/AGENTS.md`
- `apps/halcyon/AGENTS.md`
- `apps/hephaestus/AGENTS.md`
- `libs/palladium/AGENTS.md`
- `libs/habitat-db/AGENTS.md`
- `libs/habitat-shared/AGENTS.md`
- `libs/habitat-utils/AGENTS.md`

Read the AGENTS.md nearest to the file you're editing in addition to the root guide.
